args.sql:
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_Extent(omrade) AS bbox
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn = 'Lillestrøm'
GROUP BY kommunenummer, kommunenavn;

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_Extent(omrade) AS bbox
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn = 'Lillestrøm'
GROUP BY kommunenummer, kommunenavn;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, matrikkelnummertekst, kommunenummer, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '3205';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT kartleggingsomradeid, kartleggingsomradenavn, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.kartleggingsomrade
WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_Transform(ST_SetSRID(ST_MakeBox2D(ST_Point(273111.449998925,6629675.919999996), ST_Point(301398.5999995858,6665930.429999998)),25833), 25833));

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [statistiskrutenett1km]
SELECT id, ssbid1000m, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(geom,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM public.statistiskrutenett1km
WHERE ST_Intersects(geom, ST_Transform(ST_SetSRID(ST_MakeBox2D(ST_Point(273111.449998925,6629675.919999996), ST_Point(301398.5999995858,6665930.429999998)),25833), 25833));

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: spatial_join
-- left_source: 2
-- right_source: 3
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "geom_geojson"
-- right_geom: "geom_geojson"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 6: spatial_join
-- left_source: 5
-- right_source: 4
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "geom_geojson"
-- right_geom: "geom_geojson"

1.sql:
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_Extent(omrade) AS bbox
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn = 'Lillestrøm'
GROUP BY kommunenummer, kommunenavn;

1.description: Select parcels (teig) in Lillestrøm (kommunenummer 3205) with geometry (GeoJSON)

2.description: Select quick-clay mapping polygons intersecting Lillestrøm bbox

3.description: Generate 1 km grid covering Lillestrøm bbox with cell id and geometry (GeoJSON)

4.description: Intersect parcels (step 1) with quick-clay polygons (step 2) to get parcels in quick-clay areas

5.description: Intersect parcels-in-quick-clay (step 4) with 1 km grid (step 3) to assign parcels to grid cells

6.description: Count parcels per grid cell (group by grid_id)

7.description: Sort grid cells by parcel count descending
